title: Beddings and Parts of a Bed

senses.definition: the part of a bed made of soft material on which a person sleeps

examples.x: The mattress on my bed is so comfortable that I sleep soundly every night.
I need to buy a new mattress because the one I have is worn out.
The mattress was delivered yesterday, and I can't wait to try it.
The mattress is too soft for me; I need one with more support.
He prefers a firm mattress because it helps support his back.

senses.definition: a removable fabric casing that fits over a mattress to protect it from stains, spills, and dust
a cushioned layer of material that is placed on top of a mattress to add comfort and protect the mattress from wear and tear

examples.x: She added a mattress pad to her bed for extra comfort during the night.
The mattress pad helped make the old mattress feel much softer.
After spilling some coffee, he quickly removed the mattress pad to wash it.
The mattress pad provided just the right amount of cushioning for a restful sleep.
I bought a new mattress pad because the old one was getting worn out.

senses.definition: a vertical support, typically made of wood or metal, that is attached to each corner of a bed frame and extends upwards, often with decorative features, to hold up the bed's canopy or curtains

examples.x: She noticed that one of the bedposts was slightly loose and decided to tighten it.
The bedposts were painted in a soft white, matching the room's modern style.
He knocked his knee against the bedpost while trying to make the bed.
The bedpost was beautifully carved with intricate patterns, adding a touch of elegance to the room.

senses.definition: a portable bedding system consisting of a rolled-up sleeping bag or blankets with a mat or pad, used for camping or outdoor sleeping

examples.x: After setting up camp, she unrolled her bedroll and made her sleeping area.
The hikers carried their bedrolls over their shoulders as they trekked through the forest.
He slept on a bedroll by the fire, wrapped in a warm blanket.
The scout leaders advised everyone to pack a bedroll for the overnight trip.
The army soldiers used bedrolls during their training in the field.

senses.definition: the area next to a bed, typically the surface of a table, shelf or nightstand, where one can place items for convenience such as lamps, books, phones, water, or medicine

examples.x: There was a small stack of books by the bedside, ready for bedtime reading.
He set his alarm clock on the bedside so he could wake up early for work.
She placed her glasses on the bedside before going to sleep.
He kept his phone and a bottle of water on the bedside for easy access.

senses.definition: a bed frame or structure that supports a mattress and may be made of wood, metal, or other materials

examples.x: The antique bedstead was crafted from solid oak, giving the room a classic charm.
He carefully assembled the bedstead before placing the new mattress on top.
The brass bedstead gleamed in the morning light, adding elegance to the bedroom.
She decided to repaint the bedstead to match the new color scheme in her room.
We bought a new bedstead that fits perfectly with our king-size mattress.

senses.definition: a decorative panel or board that is attached to the head of a bed frame and serves as a support for the pillows

examples.x: The wooden headboard in her bedroom added a rustic charm to the space.
He leaned against the padded headboard while reading his book before bed.
The headboard was designed with shelves, offering extra storage for books and small items.
She chose an upholstered headboard for the guest room to make it more comfortable.
He accidentally scratched the headboard while moving the bed closer to the window.

senses.definition: a large, thin, and rectangular piece of cloth that is spread on a bed to lie under or on top of it

examples.x: After washing the bed linens, he pulled out a crisp, clean sheet to put on the bed before guests arrived.
The soft sheet felt comforting as she curled up in bed with a good book.
He preferred to sleep with just a light sheet during the summer to stay cool and comfortable.
The colorful sheet added a cheerful touch to the otherwise plain bedroom decor.

senses.definition: a thick bedcovering that is filled with materials such as feathers or synthetic fibers, used to keep a person warm while sleeping
a cloth bag stuffed with soft materials that we put our head on when we are lying or sleeping

examples.x: I need to buy a new pillow for better neck support.
I rested my head on a soft pillow to sleep.
Sarah used to cuddle her pillow for comfort and relaxation.
The hotel provided fluffy pillows for a good night's sleep.

senses.definition: a large piece of fabric made of wool, cotton, or other materials that is used to keep warm or to provide comfort, used on beds, sofas, chairs, etc.

examples.x: She wrapped herself in a warm blanket while watching her favorite movie on a chilly evening.
The hotel provided a soft blanket for guests to use during their stay, ensuring a comfortable night's sleep.
He pulled the heavy blanket over himself as he settled into the cozy armchair with a good book.
During the picnic, they spread out a large blanket on the grass and enjoyed a delicious lunch under the sun.
The colorful quilted blanket added a touch of warmth and style to the otherwise plain bedroom decor.

senses.definition: a small, decorative blanket or cover, typically made of a soft and cozy material such as wool, fleece, or cotton, used to drape over a couch, chair, or bed to add warmth and decoration
a decorative covering for a bed that is designed to drape over the entire bed, including the pillows, and often reaches the floor

examples.x: She spread the bedspread over the mattress to complete the look of the bedroom.
They chose a colorful bedspread to brighten up their guest room.
The bedspread was soft and light, perfect for the warm summer nights.
After making the bed, he carefully smoothed out the bedspread.
The bedspread matched the curtains perfectly, creating a cohesive room design.

senses.definition: a type of bedding made of three layers, a top layer, a middle layer of batting or filling, and a bottom layer, that are stitched or tied together to form a pattern or design
a bedsheet placed on top of the fitted sheet to add comfort and protect the blanket or comforter, usually made of cotton or other breathable materials

examples.x: I always use a flat sheet to separate the blanket from my skin for added comfort.
The flat sheet was neatly tucked into the bed, creating a clean look.
She prefers a flat sheet over her blanket during the warmer months.
He forgot to tuck in the flat sheet, so the bed looked messy.
The flat sheet in this bedding set matches the pillowcases perfectly.

senses.definition: a bed linen made of elasticized fabric that is designed to fit snugly over a mattress, with the corners of the sheet shaped to fit over the four corners of the mattress

examples.x: She pulled the fitted sheet tightly over the mattress to make sure it stayed in place.
The fitted sheet kept slipping off the corners of the mattress, so I had to tuck it in again.
I prefer using a fitted sheet because it keeps the bed neat and smooth.
The fitted sheet is so much easier to manage than a flat sheet when making the bed.
After washing the fitted sheet, I noticed it had shrunk a little.

senses.definition: a removable cover made of soft, breathable materials like cotton or linen, designed to protect a pillow from dirt and oils, and provide a comfortable sleeping surface for the head and face
a collection of bed linens that typically includes a fitted sheet, a flat sheet, and one or two pillowcases, all made from the same material and in coordinating colors or patterns

examples.x: I just bought a new sheet set with a floral design for my bed.
The sheet set I chose matches the curtains in the bedroom perfectly.
She prefers cotton sheet sets because they are softer and more breathable.
This sheet set is made from organic cotton, making it a comfortable choice for the bed.
I always keep an extra sheet set in the closet for when guests visit.

senses.definition: a bed pillow that is larger than a standard pillow, typically measuring 20 inches by 36 inches, and is designed to fit a king-size bed

examples.x: The king pillow provided perfect support for my head during a long night's sleep.
I bought a set of king pillows to match my new king-sized bed.
The large king pillow was perfect for lounging on the sofa in the living room.
She arranged two king pillows at the head of the bed for extra comfort.
The soft cotton cover on the king pillow made it feel extra cozy.

senses.definition: a long, cylindrical pillow that is designed to be hugged or wrapped around the body while sleeping, to provide support and comfort for the head, neck, shoulders, back, hips, and legs

examples.x: She hugged her body pillow tightly as she tried to get comfortable in bed.
The body pillow helped relieve some of the pressure on my back while I slept.
Many people use a body pillow during pregnancy for added comfort.
I always sleep with a body pillow between my knees to help with alignment.
He bought a body pillow to support his legs after his surgery.

senses.definition: a type of pillow that helps keep people cool while they sleep

examples.x: The cooling pillow kept me comfortable all night, even though the room was warm.
She bought a cooling pillow to help with her night sweats.
After switching to a cooling pillow, he noticed he was sleeping better and waking up less sweaty.
The cooling pillow has a gel layer that absorbs heat, making it feel much cooler than regular pillows.
During the summer, a cooling pillow is a great way to stay cool while you sleep.

senses.definition: a small, lightweight quilt or blanket designed for use with infants and young children, typically made of soft, washable fabrics like cotton or flannel, and decorated with colorful patterns or designs

examples.x: The baby quilt was carefully stitched with soft cotton fabric to keep the newborn warm.
I bought a cute baby quilt with a pastel animal design for the crib.
The baby quilt was a thoughtful gift for the new parents, adding a touch of charm to the nursery.
I love how the baby quilt feels so gentle on my baby's delicate skin.
The baby quilt provided just the right amount of warmth during those chilly nights.

senses.definition: a type of bedding made from the soft and fluffy undercoating of bird feathers, typically from ducks or geese

examples.x: The down comforter kept me warm throughout the winter night.
She loves the softness of her down comforter on cold evenings.
I need to wash the down comforter before the next season.
After a long day, curling up with a down comforter feels so relaxing.
He bought a new down comforter for his guest room.

senses.definition: a type of bedding made from man-made materials designed to provide warmth and comfort

examples.x: I bought a synthetic comforter because it is easier to wash than one filled with down.
After years of use, the synthetic comforter still looks brand new.
He chose a synthetic comforter for his guest room since it is low maintenance.
I love the softness of my synthetic comforter, and it never loses its shape.

senses.definition: a type of pillow that is filled with the soft and fluffy undercoating of bird feathers, typically from ducks or geese

examples.x: The down pillow provided a soft and comfortable place to rest my head all night.
She prefers using a down pillow because it feels much softer than synthetic options.
The down pillow fluffed up perfectly after a quick shake.
He bought a new down pillow to replace his old, flat one.
The hotel offered down pillows, which made my stay feel extra luxurious.

senses.definition: a type of pillow that is made from man-made materials such as polyester, microfiber, or memory foam, and is designed to provide support and comfort for the head and neck during sleep

examples.x: The store offers a variety of synthetic pillows in different sizes and firmness levels.
Synthetic pillows are often lighter than those filled with feathers or foam.
She bought a synthetic pillow because it was machine washable and offered good support.
They decided to use synthetic pillows in the guest room to keep costs down.

senses.definition: a decorative piece of fabric that hangs down from the mattress to the floor, designed to cover the space between the bed frame and the floor while also hiding the area under the bed

examples.x: She added a dust ruffle to her bed to cover the storage boxes underneath.
They decided to buy a dust ruffle to match their bedding set for a more coordinated look.
The new dust ruffle matched the curtains perfectly, giving the room a clean look.
After vacuuming, she smoothed out the dust ruffle so it draped evenly on the floor.
He lifted the dust ruffle to check if anything had fallen under the bed.

senses.definition: a type of bed foundation that sits underneath a mattress to provide support, absorb shock, and extend the life of the mattress

examples.x: The mattress feels much more comfortable with the box spring beneath it.
She noticed that the box spring was starting to sag, so she decided to replace it.
A box spring helps support the mattress and prevents it from losing its shape.
He lifted the mattress to check if the box spring was properly aligned with the frame.
The bed frame and box spring were delivered together as part of a complete bed set.

senses.definition: a protective barrier attached to the side of a bed to prevent the sleeper from falling out, often used for children, elderly individuals, or people with mobility or balance issues

examples.x: The safety rail on the bed helped prevent the elderly man from falling during the night.
She installed a safety rail on her child's bed to keep them safe while sleeping.
After the surgery, the hospital provided a bed with a safety rail to ensure he did not roll out.
He felt more secure sleeping with the safety rail on his side of the bed.
The new safety rail provided extra peace of mind for parents with a toddler.

senses.definition: a board or panel attached to the foot of a bed frame to prevent the sleeper's feet from slipping off and to add a decorative element
a type of inflatable mattress that can be filled with air using an electric or manual pump, and is typically made of materials like vinyl or PVC

examples.x: The air bed was perfect for our camping trip since it was easy to carry and inflate.
We set up the air bed in the living room when we had extra guests staying over.
After the party, we deflated the air bed and stored it in the closet for next time.
I bought an air bed for my guest room because it saves space when not in use.
The kids were excited to sleep on the air bed during our family vacation.

senses.definition: a type of bed covering that is made up of two or more layers of fabric, with the inner layer being padded or filled to provide warmth

examples.x: The quilted bedspread added a cozy and elegant touch to the guest room.
I love the soft texture of the quilted bedspread on my bed.
After washing the quilted bedspread, it looked as good as new.
The quilted bedspread kept me warm throughout the night without being too heavy.
They decided to use a quilted bedspread to match the new bedroom decor.
